summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Vertiv BOM Grid - all major features working correctly with modern glassmorphism design

design_issues.issue: Minor testid naming inconsistency for category cards (in-progress, at-risk)

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with all 4 KPI cards (Progress, Blockers, At Risk, Orderable)
Pre-CO Workspace card displays correct statistics (4 items, 48% avg readiness, 0 ready for CO)
Cycle Time metrics section renders with 3 progress bars
Navigation from Dashboard to BOM Grid works seamlessly
Navigation from Dashboard to CO Readiness Review works
BOM Grid shows 13+ items in hierarchical structure
Role-based view toggles work (Engineering, Procurement, PM)
View mode toggles work (All Items, Pre-CO Workspace)
Clicking BOM rows opens Item Detail Drawer correctly
Item Detail Drawer shows CO Submission Eligibility status
Item Detail Drawer shows readiness percentages (Design, Procurement, Manufacturing, Quality, Overall)
Item Detail Drawer tabs work (Details, Blockers, History)
CO Readiness Review shows category cards (Ready, Blocked functional, minor naming issue on In-Progress/At-Risk)
CO Readiness Review shows distribution bar
Filter toggle button works - opens and closes panel
Export and Refresh buttons are visible and accessible
All navigation flows work bidirectionally
Pre-CO Workspace view mode shows orange-themed items correctly
Glassmorphism design theme is consistently applied
Industrial orange and gray color scheme is properly implemented
